name: Port Tobacco Recreation Center
description: Port Tobacco Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Port Tobacco, MD. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Waldorf Senior and Recreational Center
description: Waldorf Senior and Recreational Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Waldorf, MD. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.
